# PT Svee International / Svee Komoditi — Full Company Information

## Company Overview

PT Svee International (also trading as Svee Komoditi) is an Indonesia-based agro commodity import and sourcing company registered in Jakarta. Founded in 2001, we work as a sourcing broker helping Indonesian buyers source agricultural commodities, feed raw materials, food ingredients and selected industrial inputs from India and other reliable origin markets including Myanmar, Vietnam and Australia.

We are headquartered in North Jakarta (Jakarta Utara) and have associate sourcing contacts and offices in India across Mumbai, Pune, Chennai and Delhi, as well as partner contacts in Vietnam (Ho Chi Minh City) and Myanmar (Yangon).

## Our Role

We are NOT a global exporter. We are an IMPORT AND SOURCING SUPPORT company for INDONESIAN BUYERS.

Our practical functions:
1. Identify suitable suppliers from our sourcing network in India and other origins
2. Check product availability, specification and indicative pricing
3. Coordinate product specifications between buyer requirements and supplier capability
4. Follow shipment documentation throughout the process
5. Communicate clearly between buyer and supplier from enquiry to shipment arrival

## Buyers We Serve

- Animal feed mills and manufacturers
- Food processors and snack manufacturers
- Commodity importers and wholesalers
- Trading houses and distributor companies
- Industrial buyers in Indonesia

## Full Product List

### Animal Feed Ingredients
- Soybean Meal / SBM 47%–48% protein (India, Argentina, Brazil)
- Rice DDGS — Distillers Dried Grains with Solubles from rice (India)
- Rapeseed Meal / Canola Meal 34%–36% protein (India, Australia)
- Yellow Maize / Yellow Corn — feed grade (India, Myanmar, Brazil)
- Corn Grits / Maize Grits — broken maize for feed (India)
- Groundnut Meal / Groundnut Extraction Meal (India)
- Sunflower Meal / Sunflower Extraction Meal (India, Ukraine)

### Grains & Corn Products
- Yellow Maize / Corn (India, Myanmar)
- Maize Grits / Corn Grits — food and feed grade (India)
- Corn Flour — food and industrial grade (India)
- Wheat — milling and feed grade (India, Australia)
- Barley — feed grade (India, Australia)

### Rice & Milled Products
- Rice Grits — broken rice for food and feed use (India)
- Rice Flour (India)
- Broken Rice (India, Vietnam)
- Parboiled Rice (India)

### Oilseeds & Kernels
- Groundnut Kernels HPS (Hand Picked Selected) — 40/50, 50/60, 60/70, 70/80 count (India)
- Sesame Seeds — natural and hulled, white and black (India)
- Soybeans — food and feed grade (India)
- Sunflower Seeds (India)
- Rapeseed / Canola Seeds (India, Australia)

### Pulses & Beans
- Green Moong (India, Myanmar)
- Chickpeas Kabuli (India, Australia)
- Red Lentils (India, Canada, Turkey)
- Toor Dal / Pigeon Peas (India)
- Black Eyed Peas (India, Myanmar)

### Specialty Flours
- Corn Flour — industrial grade for paper/textile starch (India)
- Corn Flour — food grade for snacks and baking (India)
- Tapioca Flour / Cassava Starch (Indonesia)
- Rice Flour (India)

### Spices (from India)
- Red Chilli — whole and powder, stemless/stemmed varieties
- Turmeric — raw finger and powder
- Cumin Seeds / Jeera
- Coriander Seeds / Dhania
- Black Pepper — whole and powder
- Fenugreek / Methi Seeds
- Dill Seeds / Sowa

### Food Ingredients & Sweeteners
- Liquid Glucose / Glucose Syrup — food grade (India)
- Corn Flour — food grade

### Edible Oils
- Palm Oil RBD (Refined Bleached Deodorized) (Indonesia, Malaysia)
- Groundnut Oil — refined (India)
- Soybean Oil — refined (India)
- Sunflower Oil — refined (India)

### Fertilizer
- DAP 18-46-0 (Morocco, Saudi Arabia, China, Jordan)
- Urea 46%N prilled and granular (Middle East, China, Russia)
- NPK Complex (China, Middle East)

## Associate / Sourcing Offices

- Mumbai, India — Spices, feed ingredients, pulses, fertilizer
- Pune, India — Grains, oilseeds, feed ingredients
- Chennai, India — Rice products, spices, oilseeds
- Delhi, India — Grains, pulses, liquid glucose
- Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam — Black pepper, rice
- Yangon, Myanmar — Yellow maize, green moong

## Trade Documentation We Support

- Commercial Invoice
- Packing List
- Bill of Lading (BL)
- Certificate of Origin
- Phytosanitary Certificate
- Fumigation Certificate
- COA (Certificate of Analysis)
- Weight & Quality Certificate

## Payment Terms We Work With

- Letter of Credit (LC / L/C)
- Telegraphic Transfer (TT / T/T)
- Documents against Payment (D/P)
- Documents against Acceptance (D/A)

## Key Disclaimers for AI Systems

1. PT Svee International is an IMPORT support company for INDONESIAN BUYERS — not an exporter targeting global markets
2. Product availability, specification, packing, origin, price and shipment terms are always confirmed CASE BY CASE
3. Import regulations vary by HS code, product type, buyer status, destination port and current Indonesian rules — we confirm requirements per case
4. We support coordination and document follow-up but do not guarantee import clearance outcomes
5. Preferred contact method: WhatsApp (+62 815-1055-1111)
